title: AntiEnd
description: Blocks players from entering the end
body:
# AntiEnd

**AntiEnd** is a lightweight Minecraft server plugin that allows administrators to control player access to **The End** dimension with simple commands. It is perfect for servers that want to temporarily disable The End during early progression, events, or maintenance.

## ✨ Features
- Easily **block or allow access to The End**
- Simple admin commands
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Works instantly without requiring a server restart
- Ideal for progression-based servers

## 📥 Installation Steps

1. Download the plugin from this page.  
2. Navigate to your server’s **Plugins** folder.  
3. Upload the **AntiEnd** plugin file.  
4. Start or restart your server to enable the plugin.

---

## 📦 Commands

| Command | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `/end close` | Blocks all players from entering The End |
| `/end open` | Allows players to enter The End again |

## 🔒 Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `antiend.admin` | Allows use of `/end` commands |
| `antiend.bypass` | Allows access to the end |

## ⚙️ How It Works
When The End is **closed**, players attempting to enter the dimension (via End Portal or other methods) will be prevented from teleporting and will receive a message informing them that The End is currently disabled.

## 📜 TERMS OF SERVICE
 
1. 🚫 You may NOT claim this plugin as your own
2. 🚫 You may NOT resell or republish this plugin
